_comment: OS-FOUNDATIONAL capabilities — the set every project inherits automatically via the upgrade path (os-inherit.mjs). This is the 'In OS -> OS Upgrade Path -> Every Project Inherits' link of the capability chain (capabilities/CAPABILITY-LEDGER.md). A capability is NOT complete until it is listed here and a project's `os-inherit sync` brings it in + `os-inherit check` keeps it byte-current. Agents propagate via os-sync (base+overlay); tools/contracts/skills propagate via os-inherit (vendored, drift-checked) so a project is self-contained (works in CI without the OS mounted).
agentsNote: agents propagate via os-sync (base+overlay merge), not os-inherit; listed here for a complete view of the OS foundation.
